Translation reliability discussion

Community notes about selection, hover, and editor behavior across complicated web applications.

opened by user-lin about 2 hours ago

The extension works well on normal articles, but forum pages often include quotes, nested replies, short controls, and editable comment boxes on the same screen.

reply from maya

Previous message: selection translation should keep the original sentence visible near the translated result.

Hover translation should not create several floating buttons when the pointer moves quickly across neighboring paragraphs.

reply from devon

Input translation needs to preserve drafts in rich text editors and should ignore the toolbar buttons around the composer.

Draft reply text that should remain editable until the user triggers input translation.
